inventory_self_exception: inventory.json itself is not listed in 'files' (it cannot contain its own hash); the closed-set check is {on-disk} == {declared files} + {inventory.json}
rows_path_transform: evidence rows.jsonl: room_raw_path rewritten to the relative frozen log path 'hero-logs/<arm>/<name>.log.gz'; all other row bytes unchanged; original absolute-path arm outputs remain external
